description: For the free-spirited male, this nike fragrances Original fragrance is inspired by the musky tones that athletes love. Reminiscent of the relaxing post-game high, this eau de toilette, bottled in a delectable green flask, is best for formal outings and beach wear. Quantity: 100 mlCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
